title: URouter_Port
text: URouter_Port Specifies the port number on which the Uniface Router process listens. URouter_Port = PortNumber For example: urouter_port=13004 Default value: First available port number, starting with 13000 File section: [install] Description The port number is selected during Uniface installation. Related Links URouter_Machine Specifies the host identifier of the machine where the Uniface Router is located. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
